MainContent.dictDef1: She is this house. She is the table. She is the dinner that never repeats.
MainContent.dictDef2: She is the feeling that you are exactly where you need to be.

HeritageSection.heading: Where cultural heritage meets culinary excellence

CoursesSection.label: COURSES
CoursesSection.desc1: Dinner is a 7-course seasonal affair, with produce from the region and the people we know.
CoursesSection.desc2: The menu changes with every season — following the rhythm of nature, not of habit.
CoursesSection.desc3: You can add a carefully selected wine pairing or a non-alcoholic pairing of ferments and seasonal drinks.
CoursesSection.desc4: Optionally — morning begins slowly, with a 5-course breakfast served at ease, without a clock.

TableSection.label: TABLE
TableSection.desc1: There are no separate tables here. There is one large table with twelve seats.
TableSection.desc2: Everyone sits together. No roles. No rush. Strangers become companions, and dinner becomes a shared experience.
TableSection.desc3: The table gathers people who come not just to eat, but to feel the rhythm of the place.

StorySection.farAway1: From the noise. From the rush. From places that all look the same.
StorySection.farAway2: Where seasons can still be felt, and silence carries meaning.
StorySection.farAway3: Somewhere among the hills of the Balkans hides a small village that you don't find by accident.
StorySection.house2: Inside, wondrous things happen. Slowly. Quietly. With great care.
StorySection.house3: The fire crackles. The seasons set the rhythm. And the table gathers people who come not just to eat, but to experience.
StorySection.whatIs1: ONÀ was born right here — as an idea for a kitchen that does not rush, does not repeat itself, and does not try to be everything for everyone.
StorySection.whatIs2: A kitchen that follows the season. The place. The mood of the village.
StorySection.whatIs3: Our menu changes. The evenings are full of stories. And the experience is always a little… wondrous.
StorySection.night1: We have two restored village houses for overnight stays.
StorySection.night2: The stay is a compliment to the dinner — so there is no rush, and the night remains part of the experience.

AboutPage.storyHeading: A place where every dish tells a story
AboutPage.storyText1: ONA was born from a deep love for Bulgarian culinary traditions and a desire to share them with the world. Nestled in the heart of Skatevtsi, our restaurant is a celebration of heritage, flavor, and artistry.
AboutPage.storyText2: Every ingredient we use is carefully sourced from local farms and producers, ensuring that each plate reflects the authenticity and richness of our land.
AboutPage.philosophyHeading: Rooted in tradition, refined by passion
AboutPage.philosophyText: We believe that great food begins with great respect — for the ingredients, the process, and the people who gather around the table. Our kitchen is guided by seasonality, simplicity, and a relentless pursuit of excellence.
AboutPage.value1Text: Every ingredient tells a story of the land it comes from. We partner with local farmers and artisans.
AboutPage.value2Text: Each dish is a work of art, meticulously prepared with techniques passed down through generations.
AboutPage.value3Text: We create an atmosphere where every guest feels like family, welcomed with warmth and care.
AboutPage.teamText: Our team brings together years of culinary expertise, a shared passion for Bulgarian cuisine, and an unwavering commitment to creating unforgettable dining experiences.

articles.title: Seasonal Menu Launch
articles.excerpt: Discover our new spring menu featuring the finest local ingredients and innovative flavor combinations.

articles.title: Wine Tasting Evening
articles.excerpt: Join us for an exclusive evening of Bulgarian wines paired with specially curated dishes from our chef.

articles.title: Chef's Table Experience
articles.excerpt: An intimate dining experience where our head chef prepares a bespoke multi-course meal right before your eyes.

articles.title: Farm-to-Table Partnership
articles.excerpt: We are proud to announce our new partnership with local organic farms in the Rhodope mountains.

articles.title: Holiday Special Menu
articles.excerpt: Celebrate the festive season with our specially crafted holiday menu featuring traditional Bulgarian delicacies.

articles.title: Culinary Workshop
articles.excerpt: Learn the secrets of Bulgarian cuisine in our hands-on workshop led by our award-winning chef.

BookPage.introText: Join us for an unforgettable dining experience. Reserve your table and let us take care of the rest.
BookPage.info1Text: Smart casual. We want you to feel comfortable while enjoying the ambiance.
BookPage.info2Text: Please notify us at least 24 hours in advance if you need to cancel or modify your reservation.
BookPage.info3Text: For groups of 8 or more, please contact us directly by phone for special arrangements.

VoucherPage.introHeading: Sometimes the most beautiful gift is not an object, but a memory.
VoucherPage.introText: The ONA voucher is an invitation to an evening that lingers long after the candles go out.
VoucherPage.scrollText: A dark-green leaf with the ONA logo — the first trace towards an evening far from almost everything.
VoucherPage.blankText: A finely illustrated sheet, left intentionally blank. For words written by hand.
VoucherPage.blankNote: Because there is no more beautiful gesture than a personal message — with thought, with care, with love.
VoucherPage.howText1: Evenings at ONA are small and carefully prepared. That is why our vouchers are tied to a specific date.
VoucherPage.howText2: We do not work with open reservations — each evening is created specially for a particular moment and a set number of guests.
VoucherPage.howText3: If the chosen date is not convenient for the recipient, it can be changed up to 14 days in advance, so we have time to invite another guest to the freed seat.
VoucherPage.howNote: In case of no-show or cancellation, the voucher amount is non-refundable.
VoucherPage.exp1: Dinner at ONA is a 7-course seasonal menu inspired by the local nature and produce around us.
VoucherPage.exp2: All guests share one common table — conversation is part of the evening.
VoucherPage.exp3: The overnight stay is a gift from us — in renovated village houses in Stakevtsi.
VoucherPage.exp4: Bathrooms are shared between two rooms, part of the authentic character and simple comfort of the place.
VoucherPage.addon1: Wine pairing — carefully selected for each dish
VoucherPage.addon2: Non-alcoholic pairing — ferments, kombuchas and seasonal drinks
VoucherPage.addon3: 5-course breakfast, served at ease — without a clock, without rush.
VoucherPage.ctaText: If you wish to gift an experience at ONA, we will gladly send you the full terms and payment information. You can reach us via the form below or by email.
VoucherPage.ctaClosing: Sometimes the most beautiful gifts are those experienced together.
